title: NYC Open Data — 311 Service Requests
description: Over 32 million rows of 311 service request data from New York City going back to 2010. Covers noise complaints, rodent sightings, illegal dumping, and more. Excellent for urban analytics and civic tech projects.

title: Global Air Quality Index (OpenAQ)
description: Real-time and historical air quality measurements aggregated from thousands of government monitoring stations worldwide. Accessible via API or downloadable CSVs. Great for environmental science and public health curricula.

title: Tidy Tuesday — Weekly Data Projects
description: A weekly social data project in R4DS aimed at practicing data wrangling and visualization skills. A new dataset is released every Tuesday, with community solutions shared on social media. Beginner-friendly with strong community support.

title: World Bank Open Data
description: Free and open access to global development data covering hundreds of indicators across 217 economies. Includes GDP, poverty rates, health metrics, education statistics, and more, spanning decades of data collection.

title: Kaggle Learn — Data Science Micro-courses
description: Free, self-paced micro-courses covering Python, SQL, Machine Learning, Data Visualization, and more. Each course includes interactive notebooks and competitions to apply skills. Ideal for beginners to intermediate learners.

title: FiveThirtyEight Open Data Repository
description: Datasets behind articles and interactive features published by FiveThirtyEight. Topics include elections, sports, economics, science, and culture. Data comes with methodology documentation and the source analysis code.

title: Chicago Data Portal
description: The official open data portal for the City of Chicago with over 700 datasets on crime, health, transportation, permits, businesses, and more. One of the most complete and well-documented city open data portals in the US.

title: Observable — Community Notebooks
description: A reactive notebook platform for data analysis and visualization. The community gallery contains thousands of published notebooks spanning business analytics, journalism, scientific research, and education. Code and data are openly shared.

title: CORGIS Dataset Project
description: A collection of interesting, curated datasets designed specifically for educational use. Includes datasets on airline safety, billionaires, cancer rates, county demographics, and dozens more. Available in CSV, JSON, and language-specific library form.

title: NASA Earthdata
description: NASA's gateway to Earth science data from satellites, field campaigns, and in situ measurements. Includes climate, atmosphere, ocean, land surface, and cryosphere datasets. Requires a free account for downloads.
